sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_padding (id Int32, value String, padding_length UInt32, pad_string String DEFAULT ' ');
SELECT id, rightPad(value, padding_length, pad_string) FROM test_padding WHERE padding_length > LENGTH(value);
SELECT id, rightPad(value, 10) as padded_value, rightPad(value, 10, '*') as padded_star FROM test_padding HAVING LENGTH(padded_value) > 8;
SELECT id, * FROM (SELECT id, rightPad(value, padding_length, pad_string) as padded_value FROM test_padding) WHERE padded_value GLOBAL IN (SELECT DISTINCT rightPad('xyz', 5, '0'));
SELECT rightPad(value, 5, NULL) as padded_value FROM test_padding WHERE padded_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) as count FROM (SELECT id, rightPad(value, 10) AS padded_value FROM test_padding) GROUP BY id HAVING count > 1;

SELECT id, rightPad(value, 5, 'abc') FROM test_padding WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_padding WHERE LENGTH(value) = 0) GLOBAL IN (SELECT id FROM test_padding) ORDER BY rightPad(value, padding_length) DESC;
SELECT id, rightPad(NULL, 10, '*'), rightPad(value, padding_length, pad_string) AS right_padded FROM test_padding WHERE id < 5;
SELECT rightPad(TOString(10), 5, '0') AS padded_number FROM test_padding WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_padding);
